<thought>
I am at the left side of the open area facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. Turning right will face me downward toward a clear path through floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

#.LG#

<thought>
I am at the upper-left interior cell facing down. Moving forward would take me safely downward, while turning is unnecessary right now and the lava is to my immediate right. Advancing down positions me closer to the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the bottom row inside the room, facing down toward a wall. The goal is two cells to my right, but the cell immediately to my right is lava, so I should not turn toward or move into it. First I should turn to face a safe direction and avoid the wall and lava; turning right will face me left toward a safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
